items.text_for_match: Referee halts La Liga game under racism protocol Sunday's La Liga match between Elche and Espanyol is paused for three minutes after the referee instigates Uefa's racism protocol. items.ja: 'It's cultural' - red cards and set-pieces wrecking Chelsea's season
items.en: 'It's cultural' - red cards and set-pieces wrecking Chelsea's season
items.text_for_match: 'It's cultural' - red cards and set-pieces wrecking Chelsea's season Two set‑piece goals and a red card tell a familiar story for Chelsea, now six points adrift of the Premier League's top four and down to sixth in the table. items.ja: Would it be bigger gamble not to give Carrick Man Utd job?
items.en: Would it be bigger gamble not to give Carrick Man Utd job?
items.text_for_match: Would it be bigger gamble not to give Carrick Man Utd job? With six wins and a draw from seven games in charge of Manchester United, would it prove more of a gamble not to give Michael Carrick the head coach position full-time? items.ja: Forest 'focusing on the present' - but will they stay up?
